ListSnic.vpcId: Identifier of the VPC to which the service NIC belongs
ListSnic.name: Name of the service NIC
ListSnic.ipAddress: IP address of the service NIC
ListSnic.status: Status of the service NIC; valid values: available/dead, indicating attachable/non-attachable respectively
ListSnic.subnetId: Identifier of the subnet to which the service NIC belongs
ListSnic.service: Domain name of the service bound to the service NIC
ListSnic.marker: Starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListSnic.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000; default is 1000
